jobs.title: Director, Data Engineering and Intelligence
jobs.description:
About SHEIN 

SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, offering SHEIN branded apparel and products from a global network of vendors, all at affordable prices. Headquartered in Singapore, with more than 15,000 employees operating from offices around the world, SHEIN is committed to making the beauty of fashion accessible to all, promoting its industry-leading, on-demand production methodology, for a smarter, future-ready industry. 

Position Summary 

We’re seeking a full-time Director of Data Engineering and Intelligence (Official Title: Director I, Data Engineering and Intelligence) for our San Diego-based corporate office, who will lead and oversee our US data engineering, intelligence, and infrastructure teams. This is a technical leadership role where you will drive innovation, mentor engineers, supervise operations, and shape the future of SHEIN’s data ecosystem. Reporting directly to the CTO, you will shape the company’s data technology strategy, architecture, and operations at scale.

Job Responsibilities 

Technical Leadership & Innovation

  • A strong ability to leverage AI to drive large-scale automation and lead AI-driven transformation across data engineering and intelligence practices, with hands-on familiarity with modern AI-native development tools (e.g., Claude Code).

  • Prior experience as a data or technology leader (e.g., tech lead or architect) is required. We are looking for someone who not only has deep knowledge of modern data infrastructure, but also brings strong perspectives and ideas—someone who can provide guidance, influence technical direction, and serve as a thought leader to help evolve and strengthen our ecosystem.

People Management

  • The role is expected to balance approximately 50% leadership and team management with 50% focus on driving technology advancement and providing technical thought leadership.

  • You will be expected to lead a team of 10–20 engineers, overseeing recruiting, career development, performance management, and team structure for the engineering organization.

Strategic Collaboration 

  • Partner closely with the CTO to define and execute long-term data technology initiatives, including infrastructure modernization, AI transformation, and operational excellence.

Global Operations & Cross-Regional Collaboration

  • Lead and optimize U.S.-based data operations while working closely with teams across APAC and global headquarters to align workflows and strengthen global data capabilities. The role requires strong cross-cultural leadership and organizational influence—someone who can build trust across regions, navigate complex organizational structures, and effectively collaborate across cultural and functional boundaries to drive alignment and progress.

Data Infrastructure & Best Practices

  • Architect, build, and refine large-scale data pipelines and cloud-based infrastructure solutions, ensuring they meet best practices and regulatory requirements.

 Job Requirements 

  • Master’s degree in Computer Science or a related field.
  • 5+ years of industry experience in data engineering, data infrastructure, or software development (8+ years preferred). 
  • 2+ years of engineering management experience (3+ years preferred), with a demonstrated ability to lead, mentor, and grow engineering teams.
  • Deep expertise in modern cloud platforms and large-scale data infrastructure, including technologies within the MapReduce ecosystem and distributed data processing frameworks
  • Hands-on familiarity with modern AI technologies and AI-native development tools (e.g., Claude Code, MCP, and related tooling).
  • Proven ability to operate and improve large-scale technical systems, including diagnosing complex infrastructure and data quality issues and implementing scalable solutions.
  • Strong computer science fundamentals, particularly in Linux systems, networking, and SQL.
  • Proficiency in scripting and automation, especially using Python and Bash (these skills will be assessed during the interview process).
  • Experience working with containerized and distributed systems such as Kubernetes and Docker, as well as designing high-availability architectures.
  • At least 3 years of experience collaborating with APAC-based teams or other international engineering organizations.

Nice to Have

  • Experience with Azure.  
  • Experience managing people leaders 
  • Knowledge of data streaming technologies (e.g., Flink, Hive).  
  • Prior experience in the eCommerce space. 
  • Bilingual in Mandarin. 

Benefits and Perks 

  • Bonus and RSU eligible
  • Healthcare (medical, dental, vision, prescription drugs) 
  • Health Savings Account with Employer Funding 
  • Flexible Spending Accounts (Healthcare and Dependent care) 
  • Company-Paid Basic Life/AD&D insurance 
  • Company-Paid Short-Term and Long-Term Disability 
  • Voluntary Benefit Offerings (Voluntary Life/AD&D, Hospital Indemnity, Critical Illness, and Accident) 
  • Employee Assistance Program 
  • Business Travel Accident Insurance 
  • 401(k) Savings Plan with discretionary company match and access to a financial advisor  
  • Vacation, paid holidays, floating holiday and sick days   
  • Employee discounts 
  • Free weekly catered lunch 
  • Dog-friendly office (available at select locations) 
  • Free gym access (available at select locations) 
  • Free swag giveaways 
  • Annual Holiday Party 
  • Invitations to pop-ups and other company events 
  • Complimentary daily office snacks and beverages

jobs.title: Backend Engineer II
jobs.description:
Full-time or part-time: Full-time

Position Summary: SHEIN (SHEIN Technology LLC) is seeking a Backend Engineer II in San Diego CA, to participate in all phases of the software development life cycle.

Job title: Backend Engineer II

Job Location: San Diego, CA

Job Description:

Participate in all phases of the software development life cycle. Collaborate with English and Chinese speaking teams to troubleshoot online quality problems. Work closely with English and Chinese speaking cross-functional teams to diagnose and resolve software issues. Work with documentation and tooling in Chinese language. Participate in requirements review, design planning, and implementation. Engage in requirements gathering sessions to clarify new feature and system needs. Write code according to design requirements and coding standards, create technical documentation, and ensure code quality and performance. Develop clean, efficient, and maintainable code based on design documents. Conduct code reviews to ensure quality and identify improvements. Provide mentorship and technical leadership to junior team members. 10% domestic travel for business meetings and technology support.

Minimum Education & Experience Requirements:

Master’s degree or a foreign equivalent in Computer Science, or a related field, plus 1 year post-baccalaureate experience in job offered or any Software Engineering related job titles.

Written and spoken Chinese language is required.

Requires 1 year of experience in:

1. Retail supply chain optimization

2. Enterprise mobility management (EMM)

3. Front-end frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js.

4. Java and related technologies - Spring Boot and MyBatis

5. OSS technologies including Kafka and container technology including Docker and Kubernetes

6. Mobile application development on the Android platform with Kotlin and Flutter

7. Large Language Model Operations (LLMOps)

Salary range: $179,320- $188,000/year

jobs.title: Staff Database Engineer
jobs.description:
About SHEIN 

SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, offering SHEIN branded apparel and products from a global network of vendors, all at affordable prices. Headquartered in Singapore, with more than 15,000 employees operating from offices around the world, SHEIN is committed to making the beauty of fashion accessible to all, promoting its industry-leading, on-demand production methodology, for a smarter, future-ready industry. 

Position Summary

We are seeking a Staff Database Engineer (Official Title: Staff Database Engineer I) with experience managing large-scale, mission-critical environments that require zero downtime. As part of the SHEIN DBRE team, you will play a key role in ensuring the reliability, performance, and security of our database infrastructure through automation and scalable solutions. Our team integrates DBA, SRE, and DBRE expertise to deliver highly available data services. We design resilient architectures to meet evolving business and data processing demands, prioritizing efficiency and system reliability. While each team member may have their preferred technologies, a deep understanding of database fundamentals—and how different database systems interact with applications and operating systems—is essential for success. This role requires collaboration across multiple customer environments and global teams. 

This role requires independent execution and the ability to manage critical production systems without direct supervision. Commitment to incident response and adherence to on-call responsibilities is essential. 

 

Job Responsibilities

  • Maintain scalable, reliable, and robust production database environments across various database systems, including MySQL, ClickHouse, and MongoDB.
  • Continuously monitor database health, proactively diagnose issues, and implement resolutions as needed. 
  • Optimize database performance through query tuning, index optimization, and performance diagnostics.
  • Develop and maintain database tools and automation scripts to streamline operations and reduce manual toil.
  • Collaborate with development teams and engineers to provide guidance on database design, best practices, and architectural decisions.
  • Manage database upgrades, migrations, and schema changes while ensuring minimal disruption and improved performance.
  • Triage and resolve database issues, driving incidents to resolution and implementing preventative measures.
  • Conduct capacity planning and benchmarking across multiple database technologies.
  • Ensure data integrity, high availability, security, and privacy compliance across all database environments.
  • Provide 24/7 escalated on-call support as part of a pager rotation.

Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related technical field, or equivalent experience.
  • 4+ years of hands-on MySQL database management experience.
  • 4+ years of experience with Azure, AWS, or any other major cloud provider.
  • Strong understanding of distributed and replicated database architectures.
  • Proven troubleshooting and problem-solving skills, with a strong sense of ownership and accountability.
  • Experience in monitoring and analyzing system performance, identifying bottlenecks, and improving database reliability and scalability.
  • Proficiency in at least one scripting language (e.g., Golang, Shell); familiarity with Golang development is a plus.
  • Passion for solving scalability and performance challenges in large-scale environments.
  • Ability to remain calm and focused under pressure, especially during critical incidents.
  • Strong expertise in Linux operating systems, storage, networking, and related system principles.

 

Nice to Have

  • Bilingual fluency in Mandarin and English is highly preferred.
  • 5+ years of experience managing MySQL at scale in high-performance environments.
  • Experience with ClickHouse, MongoDB, or other distributed database systems.
  • Deep knowledge of database internals, including the ability to independently deploy and optimize open-source tools like Percona or MySQL source code.
  • Hands-on experience with Golang development or proficiency in other programming languages for automation.
  • Hands-on experience using multiple AI models (Claude Code, ChatGPT, Gemini) to solve real-world problems, including troubleshooting model limitations, comparing outputs, and applying prompt tuning strategies to improve result quality
  • Experience building AI-driven operations tools or platforms from scratch, covering requirements, architecture design, and production deployment.
  • Participated in team-wide AI tooling transformation initiatives; contributed to or established shared asset libraries covering Prompts, MCP integrations, and Skills.
  • Familiar with AI application frameworks such as LangChain and LlamaIndex, with practical experience integrating them with relational or vector databases.
  • Able to systematically structure and document database tuning knowledge into AI-consumable formats (knowledge bases, RAG corpora, Skill libraries), driving continuous improvement of team-wide tuning capabilities.

 

Benefits and Perks 

  • Bonus and RSU eligible
  • Healthcare (medical, dental, vision, prescription drugs) 
  • Health Savings Account with Employer Funding 
  • Flexible Spending Accounts (Healthcare and Dependent care) 
  • Company-Paid Basic Life/AD&D insurance 
  • Company-Paid Short-Term and Long-Term Disability 
  • Voluntary Benefit Offerings (Voluntary Life/AD&D, Hospital Indemnity, Critical Illness, and Accident) 
  • Employee Assistance Program 
  • Business Travel Accident Insurance 
  • 401(k) Savings Plan with discretionary company match and access to a financial advisor  
  • Vacation, paid holidays, floating holiday and sick days   
  • Employee discounts 
  • Free weekly catered lunch 
  • Dog-friendly office (available at select locations) 
  • Free gym access (available at select locations) 
  • Free swag giveaways 
  • Annual Holiday Party 
  • Invitations to pop-ups and other company events 
  • Complimentary daily office snacks and beverages

jobs.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
jobs.description:
About SHEIN 

SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, offering SHEIN branded apparel and products from a global network of vendors, all at affordable prices. Headquartered in Singapore, with more than 15,000 employees operating from offices around the world, SHEIN is committed to making the beauty of fashion accessible to all, promoting its industry-leading, on-demand production methodology, for a smarter, future-ready industry. 

Position Summary 

We are seeking a Senior Site Reliability Engineer (Official Title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer I) with deep experience operating and evolving large-scale, mission-critical systems where availability and reliability are non-negotiable. At SHEIN, Site Reliability Engineers are hybrid software and systems engineers responsible for keeping production services always on while enabling the platform to scale rapidly and safely. In this role, you will own and support complex services and infrastructure, ensuring they consistently meet reliability and performance expectations. The SRE team owns and maintains critical open-source and in-house technologies that underpin the platform and serves as a core contributor to major engineering initiatives. We are accountable for driving platform operability forward by reducing incident frequency, minimizing MTTR, and improving system resilience, efficiency, and resource utilization. You will work closely with global, cross-functional teams to design, build, and evolve observability and operational tooling—including metrics, logs, traces, alerting, and automation—providing deep visibility into system behavior. Through hands-on engineering and operational excellence, you will proactively identify risks and failure modes, help prevent incidents before they occur, and lead fast, effective responses when they do. To succeed in this role, you will combine strong software engineering skills, solid to deep expertise in Linux, networking, and distributed systems, and a passion for solving problems of scale, complexity, and reliability. Your work will directly contribute to delivering a stable, scalable, and high-performing experience for customers worldwide.

 Job Responsibilities 

  • Keep SHEIN’s mission-critical production systems running 24/7/365, participating in on-call rotations and acting decisively during incidents. 
  • Triage and resolve production incidents, driving root cause analysis and contributing to continuous improvements that reduce MTTR and prevent recurrence.
  • Monitor and manage capacity planning and resource utilization, partnering with cross-functional teams to ensure systems scale safely while remaining cost-effective.
  • Own and operate core open-source infrastructure such as APISIX, Nginx, Kubernetes, Kafka, Elasticsearch, Redis, Consul, Etcd, Zookeeper and other large-scale distributed systems.
  • Design, build, and maintain observability solutions (metrics, logs, traces, alerting) to improve system visibility, reliability, and resiliency.
  • Automate operational workflows and eliminate manual toil through scripting, tooling, and process improvements.
  • Develop and maintain technical documentation, including runbooks, architecture diagrams, operational procedures, and on-call playbooks.
  • Work closely with global engineering teams to improve infrastructure reliability and performance through better system design and operational discipline.

 Job Requirements 

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related technical discipline, or equivalent practical experience. 
  • 3+ years of experience owning and operating large-scale, high-traffic, 24/7 production systems, ideally in cloud or cloud-native environments. 
  • Solid foundations in Linux, networking, and distributed systems, with the ability to debug complex production issues end to end.
  • Hands-on experience with incident response, troubleshooting, and performance optimization in distributed systems.
  • Strong software engineering skills with experience building automation, tooling, or platforms in languages such as Python or Go.
  • Experience operating or supporting open-source infrastructure components such as APISIX, Nginx, Kubernetes, Kafka, Elasticsearch, Redis, Consul, Etcd, Zookeeper, etc.
  • Experience with observability and monitoring systems (Prometheus, Grafana, Zabbix, etc.) and performance analysis.
  • Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and configuration management tools (e.g., Ansible).
  • A strong sense of ownership, a systematic approach to problem-solving, and a passion for making systems more reliable.
  • Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with geographically distributed teams.

 Nice to Have 

  • Bilingual fluency in Mandarin and English.
  • Kubernetes Administrator certification or equivalent real-world experience.
  • Experience operating big data platforms (Hadoop, Yarn, HBase, Hive, Spark).
  • Experience applying AI/LLM-powered tools to reliability engineering, including designing and building automation or internal tools using AI-assisted development platforms (e.g., Claude Code).

Benefits and Perks 

  • Bonus eligible
  • Healthcare (medical, dental, vision, prescription drugs) 
  • Health Savings Account with Employer Funding 
  • Flexible Spending Accounts (Healthcare and Dependent care) 
  • Company-Paid Basic Life/AD&D insurance 
  • Company-Paid Short-Term and Long-Term Disability 
  • Voluntary Benefit Offerings (Voluntary Life/AD&D, Hospital Indemnity, Critical Illness, and Accident) 
  • Employee Assistance Program 
  • Business Travel Accident Insurance 
  • 401(k) Savings Plan with discretionary company match and access to a financial advisor  
  • Vacation, paid holidays, floating holiday and sick days   
  • Employee discounts 
  • Free weekly catered lunch 
  • Dog-friendly office (available at select locations) 
  • Free gym access (available at select locations) 
  • Free swag giveaways 
  • Annual Holiday Party 
  • Invitations to pop-ups and other company events 
  • Complimentary daily office snacks and beverages

jobs.title: Senior Software Development Engineer
jobs.description:
About SHEIN 

SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, offering SHEIN branded apparel and products from a global network of vendors, all at affordable prices. Headquartered in Singapore, with more than 15,000 employees operating from offices around the world, SHEIN is committed to making the beauty of fashion accessible to all, promoting its industry-leading, on-demand production methodology, for a smarter, future-ready industry. 

Position Summary

Join SHEIN’s Global Security Engineering team to build robust, scalable, and secure AI solutions that protect global operations across cloud and on-prem environments. You will own work end to end—architecture, implementation, deployment, and operations—while collaborating closely with security partners to automate and elevate SecOps. Expect to design AI-driven threat management capabilities that unify asset tracking, threat observability, vulnerability management, incident response, and detection. You will work across frontend and backend with AI integration, and support onsite and remote environments.

Job Responsibilities 

  • Identify, research, and architect AI/automation solutions for complex enterprise network and security applications.
  • Design and ship responsive, intuitive AI interfaces that accelerate SecOps workflows and decision-making.
  • Build and operate AI components and microservices that integrate with REST APIs for efficiency, observability, and security.
  • Lead as an individual contributor security initiatives, including technology evaluation and solution design.
  • Ensure security by design; implement and enforce information security best practices aligned with industry standards and applicable laws.
  • Deploy and integrate AI solutions with leading enterprise platforms; drive reliable rollout, monitoring, and continuous improvement.
  • Sustain high-availability services; meet business-wide SLOs and operational support objectives with strong observability and incident response.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally; produce clear runbooks, procedures, and platform documentation for repeatable operations.
  • Support both onsite and cloud systems; provide remote support to distributed offices and environments as needed.

Job Requirements 

  • 2–5 years of relevant AI experience.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field, or 5+ years of equivalent experience.
  • Proficiency in one or more scripting/programming languages (e.g., Python, C++, Bash).
  • Hands-on experience with ML frameworks and libraries: OpenCV, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Detectron2.
  • Knowledge of design, implementation, maintenance, and operations on AWS, or comparable cloud platforms (Azure, GCP).
  • Practical understanding of industry IT/security standards and regulations; able to embed security and privacy into system design.
  • Experience building AI-powered user interfaces that improve SecOps usability and outcomes.
  • Proven ability to develop AI microservices that interact with REST APIs; automate for performance, observability, and security.
  • Track record of integrating and deploying AI with enterprise applications; owning rollout, validation, and monitoring.
  • Clear, current documentation and runbooks; disciplined change-management with status and key metrics reporting.
  • Ability to work with highly technical teams and sensitive information with discretion, integrity, sound judgment, and maturity.
  • Operated services to defined SLOs with incident handling and mitigation in production environments.

Nice to Have

  • Proven end-to-end AI solution design and implementation (from prototype to production).
  • Experience building GenAI RAG applications using Langchain; GenAI observability tooling such as Langfuse.
  • Experience with microservice design, including observability, canary/blue-green rollout, and rollback.
  • SSO, SAML, and IdP integration experience (e.g., Azure AD).
  • Background in security, compliance, data loss prevention, and/or governance.

jobs.title: Data Analysis Specialist II
jobs.description:
Join our growth story!

Are you looking for an exciting new move in your career? SHEIN (www.sheingroup.com) is an international online fashion retailer that’s in an exciting new phase of our continued growth!
If you like to work fast, collaboratively and understand the true value of idea generation with a ‘customer first’ mentality - you’re on your way to being a right fit for us.
As a fast growing business with an immediate need to innovatively build out our talent infrastructure, we’re looking for a dynamic professional who is keen to work in an agile and evolving business environment. There’s work, and then there’s the work you’re passionate about.
The kind of work that’s an extension of who you are. That’s the work we do at SHEIN.
Our values consist of putting the customer first, going all out, acting and adapting, continuous learning & innovating and encouraging synergy & collaboration at all levels within the business.
If you feel like you belong, consider the job description below and apply.
Come shine at SHEIN and join our growth story!

 

Job Responsibilities
1. Establish data monitoring system, including maintaining underlying data, building data dashboards, regularly generating data reports, and other data visualization work;
2. Monitor the overall operational health of warehousing and logistics, and periodically report any abnormalities;
3. Follow up on the implementation of KPI in the business departments, predict and compare the actual situation.

Job Requirements
1. Bachelor degree or above; 1+ years experiences in fulfillment business data analysis is plus.

2. Basic data construction capability:
Deeply understand the relationship between buried points, indicators, and reports, abstract and analyze complex businesses, and build corresponding data foundations;
According to the needs of business development, improve the data system of business lines, and use this system to timely discover problem points;
Establish a framework and process for troubleshooting data anomalies to improve troubleshooting efficiency.

3. Business insight capability:
Analyze and gain insights into different business modules of the responsible business line;
Understand business line planning, proactively analyze opportunity points, and output data analysis conclusions and recommendations that affect business line decisions through efficient and comprehensive analysis.

4. Basic technical skills:
Proficient in SQL code logic such as Hive and Presto, and proficient in data report design and development;
Proficient in data visualization, such as Excel and Tableau;
Proficient in the basic principles of buried points and ab experiments, and proficient in their application;
Proficient in SPSS, R, Python (any one), with relevant project experience.

What we offer:

  • Attractive salary;
  • Full-time employment contract;
  • Opportunities for development in the organization;
  • Annual bonus;
  • Access to company training and learning platform.


Benefits:

  • Medical care package;
  • Life and health insurance;
  • Multisport card;
  • Lunch for 1 PLN;
  • 30% discount for SHEIN products;
  • Free parking spots;
  • Company benefit fund;
  • Employee referral program;
  • Multiple teambuilding activities.

Please note that pay information, including salary bands, will be shared with candidates upon invitation to the first interview.
 

Please note that the final salary offered within the stated range will be determined following a thorough assessment of a candidate's overall profile, including but not limited to qualifications for the role, technical and soft skills, and level of experience.

●Project management and presentation skills
●Good at team collaboration
●Fluent in written and oral English.

jobs.title: 资深JAVA开发工程师（库存）
jobs.description:
职位描述：

1. 负责电商预估计划后端系统的设计和开发，以及性能优化、架构优化等工作，确保系统高可用、高性能和高稳定。

2. 负责优化现有预估计划后端系统，提高系统的效率和用户满意度，同时对系统体系结构进行规划和设计。

3. 负责协助团队处理业务需求和技术难题，并保证相关文档的编写、测试、维护等后续工作的质量。

4. 负责将大语言模型能力集成到预估计划系统中，提升业务智能化水平。


职位要求：

1. 全日制本科及以上学历，计算机、软件工程等相关专业，5年以上Java开发经验；

2. Java基础扎实，熟悉 Spring / SpringBoot 等框架，有供应链开发经验者优先；

3. 熟悉常用关系型和 NoSQL 数据库，熟悉 Redis、kafka、高并发等相关技术；

4. 有大型分布式、高并发、高负载、高可用系统设计开发经验者优先；

5. 责任心强，有较强的学习能力与分析解决问题能力，有良好的团队沟通与协作能力;

6. 有电商行业大厂从业经验优先考虑，有数据研发经验优先考虑;

7. 有LLM应用开发经验、Agent开发经验、数据分析与AI结合经验的优先考虑；

8. 有大数据（离线计算，OLAP实时分析）相关开发经验的优先考虑

jobs.title: 资深/高级数据挖掘工程师-深圳/上海
jobs.description:
工作职责：

1、深入理解业务，分析业务数据，给业务输出数据解决方案，应用机器学习/深度学习算法实现数据建模；

2、负责用户/商品画像体系建设，针对海量用户行为和内容信息持续迭代、评估、完善用户/商品标签；

3、参与智能增长相关业务，包括但不限搜推、用增、营销等，深入挖掘价值增长点，推动业务效果提升。


职位要求：

1、计算机相关专业本科及以上学历，在数据模型/搜推算法实现方面有成熟经验；

2、具备搜推算法经验，精通常见的数据挖掘、机器学习和深度学习算法；

3、至少精通一门编程语言（Python、Scala、Java等），能熟练使用常见的数据分析工具；

4、熟悉至少一种深度学习框架（Pytorch、tensorflow、Keras等）；

5、良好的沟通能力，具有跨团队的多方密切合作意识；

6、有电商经验优先，有用户增长经验优先。

jobs.title: Senior Business Development Specialist
jobs.description:
About SHEIN 

SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, offering SHEIN branded apparel and products from a global network of vendors, all at affordable prices. Headquartered in Singapore, with more than 15,000 employees operating from offices around the world, SHEIN is committed to making the beauty of fashion accessible to all, promoting its industry-leading, on-demand production methodology, for a smarter, future-ready industry. 

Position Summary 

We're seeking a full-time Senior Business Development Specialist (official title Senior Business Development Specialist I) for our Los Angeles based corporate office to drive the growth of our start-up SHEIN Marketplace business. As a key member of our team, you will be responsible for driving business growth and fostering strategic partnerships through innovative and forward-thinking approaches. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, ever-evolving environment and is passionate about making a meaningful impact.

Job Responsibilities

  • Strategic Planning: Develop and implement creative strategies to identify and penetrate new markets, leveraging market trends, e-commerce seller insights, and competitive analysis to drive business growth.
  • Innovative Solutions: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to generate innovative solutions and develop new business models for SHEIN Marketplace that address market gaps, staying ahead of the competition and ensuring long-term sustainability.
  • Market Research: Conduct thorough market research to identify e-commerce trends, seller needs, and potential areas for business development, providing valuable insights to shape our product and service offerings.
  • Partnership Development: Identify, evaluate, and forge strategic alliances and partnerships that align with our company's objectives, opening new avenues for revenue generation and market expansion.
  • Relationship Management: Build and nurture strong relationships with key stakeholders, including sizable e-commerce sellers, industry influencers, and strategic partners, to enhance our brand reputation and drive business growth.
  • Sales and Negotiation: Exceed business development targets by designing strategic and creative sales plans, participating in client presentations, and negotiating complex deals to secure profitable partnerships and achieve revenue targets.
  • Performance Analysis: Monitor and analyze business development activities, market trends, and competitor strategies to identify opportunities for improvement and optimize our business development efforts.

Job Requirements

  • Creativity and Innovation: Demonstrated ability to think outside the box, generate creative ideas, and develop innovative business development solutions to complex business challenges.
  • Analytical Mindset: Strong sales analytical skills with the ability to interpret e-commerce market data, identify trends, and leverage insights to make informed business decisions.
  • Relationship Building: Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with a proven track record of building and maintaining successful partnerships and stakeholder relationships.
  • Results-driven: Self-motivated and goal-oriented, with a passion for exceeding sales targets and driving tangible business outcomes.
  • Adaptability: Comfortable working in a fast-paced, ever-changing environment, with the ability to quickly adapt to new challenges and embrace continuous learning.

Nice to have

  • Education: Bachelor's degree in business administration, management, psychology or a related field 
  • Business Development Experience: 2-5 years of experience in business development, strategic partnerships, or a similar role in e-commerce and tech industry

Benefits and Perks 

  • Commission eligible
  • Healthcare (medical, dental, vision, prescription drugs) 
  • Health Savings Account with Employer Funding 
  • Flexible Spending Accounts (Healthcare and Dependent care) 
  • Company-Paid Basic Life/AD&D insurance 
  • Company-Paid Short-Term and Long-Term Disability 
  • Voluntary Benefit Offerings (Voluntary Life/AD&D, Hospital Indemnity, Critical Illness, and Accident) 
  • Employee Assistance Program 
  • Business Travel Accident Insurance 
  • 401(k) Savings Plan with discretionary company match and access to a financial advisor  
  • Vacation, paid holidays, floating holiday and sick days   
  • Employee discounts 
  • Free weekly catered lunch 
  • Dog-friendly office (available at select locations) 
  • Free gym access (available at select locations) 
  • Free swag giveaways 
  • Annual Holiday Party 
  • Invitations to pop-ups and other company events 
  • Complimentary daily office snacks and beverages  

#LI-YC1

jobs.title: Senior Photographer & Social Media Specialist
jobs.description:
About SHEIN 

SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, offering SHEIN branded apparel and products from a global network of vendors, all at affordable prices. Headquartered in Singapore, with more than 15,000 employees operating from offices around the world, SHEIN is committed to making the beauty of fashion accessible to all, promoting its industry-leading, on-demand production methodology, for a smarter, future-ready industry. 

Position Summary 

We’re seeking a full-time Senior Photographer & Social Media Specialist (official title: Senior Creative Direction Specialist I) for our Los Angeles-based corporate office. NYA SZN is looking for someone to lead the brand’s visual content creation and social media execution for a fast-growing, design-led fashion brand within the SHEIN ecosystem. This is a high-impact, hands-on role designed for a creative professional who is equally strong behind the camera and in driving social media growth. As NYA SZN scales its brand presence, elevated photography and consistent, strategic social storytelling are essential to increasing brand awareness, engagement, and cultural relevance. This role owns the end-to-end creation of visual content — from shoot execution through social publishing — ensuring NYA SZN’s brand is represented with consistency, quality, and momentum across platforms. The ideal candidate is a professional photographer with strong social media instincts, a commercial eye, and the ability to operate efficiently in a fast-paced fashion environment. 

Job Responsibilities 

Photography & Visual Content Creation

  • Lead and execute brand photography for product drops, lifestyle shoots, campaigns, and social-first content
  • Develop shot lists and content concepts aligned with seasonal brand direction
  • Capture elevated, on-brand imagery that reflects NYA SZN’s premium aesthetic
  • Edit and deliver high-quality photo and short-form video assets optimized for social platforms
  • Build and maintain a growing content library for ongoing campaigns and storytelling
  • Support content creation for events, behind-the-scenes moments, and brand activations as needed

Social Media Strategy & Execution

  • Own NYA SZN’s social media presence across Instagram, TikTok, and emerging platforms
  • Develop and execute a structured content strategy to drive brand awareness, engagement, and audience growth
  • Plan, schedule, and publish content consistently across channels
  • Translate photoshoots, launches, and brand moments into high-performing social content
  • Monitor performance metrics and optimize content based on engagement, reach, and growth insights
  • Engage with the brand’s community through comments, messages, and social interaction
  • Stay current on platform trends, formats, and best practices

Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Partner closely with Creative and Product teams to align content with seasonal drops, launches, and brand storytelling
  • Ensure visual storytelling supports overall brand strategy and product priorities
  • Contribute ideas for campaigns, content series, and ongoing brand storytelling initiatives
  • Maintain clear communication with internal stakeholders regarding content timelines and deliverables

Job Requirements 

  • 3+ years of professional photography experience (fashion, lifestyle, or brand content preferred) and hands-on social media management or content strategy experience
  • Strong portfolio demonstrating elevated visual storytelling and technical proficiency
  • Deep understanding of Instagram and TikTok content formats and growth tactics
  • Strong visual eye with commercial awareness
  • Ability to manage content planning, execution, and publishing independently
  • Highly organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-growth brand environment

Nice to Have

  • Short-form video editing skills
  • Experience in fashion, beauty, or lifestyle brands
  • Familiarity with social analytics and performance reporting
  • Experience supporting influencer content or brand activations

Who Will Succeed in This Role

  • A creative professional who is equally strong at execution and strategy
  • A photographer who understands what performs on social platforms
  • Someone who moves quickly while maintaining high visual standards
  • A self-starter who takes ownership from concept to publish
  • A candidate excited to grow with a scaling fashion brand

Benefits and Perks 

  • Bonus eligible
  • Healthcare (medical, dental, vision, prescription drugs) 
  • Health Savings Account with Employer Funding 
  • Flexible Spending Accounts (Healthcare and Dependent care) 
  • Company-Paid Basic Life/AD&D insurance 
  • Company-Paid Short-Term and Long-Term Disability 
  • Voluntary Benefit Offerings (Voluntary Life/AD&D, Hospital Indemnity, Critical Illness, and Accident) 
  • Employee Assistance Program 
  • Business Travel Accident Insurance 
  • 401(k) Savings Plan with discretionary company match and access to a financial advisor  
  • Vacation, paid holidays, floating holiday and sick days   
  • Employee discounts 
  • Free weekly catered lunch 
  • Dog-friendly office (available at select locations) 
  • Free gym access (available at select locations) 
  • Free swag giveaways 
  • Annual Holiday Party 
  • Invitations to pop-ups and other company events 
  • Complimentary daily office snacks and beverages

jobs.title: Graphic Designer (Contract Role, Email Marketing)
jobs.description:
About SHEIN 

SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, offering SHEIN branded apparel and products from a global network of vendors, all at affordable prices. Headquartered in Singapore, with more than 15,000 employees operating from offices around the world, SHEIN is committed to making the beauty of fashion accessible to all, promoting its industry-leading, on-demand production methodology, for a smarter, future-ready industry. 

Position Summary 

We’re seeking a Graphic Designer (Contract Role, Email Marketing) (official title: Graphic Designer) for our Los Angeles-based corporate office. This will be a temporary contract role up to 6 months. As a Graphic Designer at SHEIN, you will be responsible for creating our digital marketing assets including for email marketing, campaigns, landing page/web banners and marketing print materials. Our ideal candidate is an expert in graphic design with strong typography skills and a great attention for detail. You must have a good eye with selecting imagery and have a methodical approach with your work.  

Job Responsibilities

  • Support the creative web team with creating digital marketing assets: email, homepage, landing page, social assets and print materials.
  • Provide fresh design ideas and execute new web, mobile, app and email experiences under the supervision of the Design Manager. 
  • Work closely and collaborate with local and global cross-functional teams including copywriters, marketing, PR, web production, event management.
  • Conduct research on current fashion trends, competitor analysis, and target audience preferences.  

Job Requirements

  • 2+ years of digital design experience within a fast-paced, cross-functional creative environment, preferably within fashion e-commerce.
  • Must have an online portfolio of work that shows strong understanding of typography, digital design trends, and online visual communication.
  • Highly creative in typography and web page layout 
  • Expertise in Adobe Creative Suite: Photoshop, Illustrator, Keynote, and InDesign in a Mac environment.
  • Must be able to work as a team member, but also be resourceful as a self-starter.
  • Extremely detail-oriented, flexible and able to work in a fast-paced, deadline driven environment, managing many projects simultaneously. 

Nice to Have

  • Bachelor’s degree in graphic design, Digital Design or Fine Arts 
  • Experience in UX/UI design

jobs.description:
About SHEIN 

SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, offering SHEIN branded apparel and products from a global network of vendors, all at affordable prices. Headquartered in Singapore, with more than 15,000 employees operating from offices around the world, SHEIN is committed to making the beauty of fashion accessible to all, promoting its industry-leading, on-demand production methodology, for a smarter, future-ready industry. 

Position Summary 

We are seeking a full-time Senior Buyer/Product Developer (official title: Senior Buyer I) to join our Los Angeles–based corporate office. In this role, you will develop styles across all categories for one or more of SHEIN’s womenswear sub-brands in a fast-paced environment. You will leverage sales data to inform product decisions and manage the end-to-end development process, including trend research, supplier identification, purchase order execution, and on-time delivery.

The ideal candidate has a strong fashion sensibility, a deep understanding of current and emerging trends, and the ability to translate insights into commercially successful products.

 Job Responsibilities 

  • Partner with the Head of Merchandising to execute product strategy and optimize assortment planning
  • Develop new products, including creating technical specification packages and selecting fabrics, trims, colors, and embellishments
  • Oversee the design development process through final production, including fittings
  • Conduct vendor research and selection to improve profitability, reduce operating costs, and increase efficiency
  • Build and maintain strong vendor relationships to ensure quality standards and on-time delivery
  • Manage and execute purchase agreements, monitor vendor performance, and renegotiate contracts as needed
  • Research trends and anticipate consumer shopping behaviors to guide product decisions
  • Analyze sales data to identify opportunities for product optimization and adjustments
  • Manage product launch timelines and maintain accurate sample records
  • Mentor and support Assistant Buyers

 Job Requirements 

  • 3+ years of professional experience in womenswear buying
  • Advanced proficiency in Excel
  • Demonstrated ability to identify, conceptualize, and execute aesthetic direction aligned with trends, seasonality, and business objectives
  • Strong negotiation, budgeting, and vendor management skills
  • Data-driven mindset with the ability to leverage analytics for strategic decision-making
  • Highly organized, detail-oriented, and deadline-driven
  • Self-motivated, collaborative, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment
  • Willingness to travel domestically and internationally at least twice per year

Benefits and Perks

jobs.title: Senior Product Compliance Specialist
jobs.description:
About SHEIN 

SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, offering SHEIN branded apparel and products from a global network of vendors, all at affordable prices. Headquartered in Singapore, with more than 15,000 employees operating from offices around the world, SHEIN is committed to making the beauty of fashion accessible to all, promoting its industry-leading, on-demand production methodology, for a smarter, future-ready industry.

Position Summary

The Senior Product Compliance Specialist (official title: Senior Product Compliance Specialist II) is an integral part of the Americas Product Compliance Team, reporting to the Americas Director II of Product Compliance or a Product Compliance Manager.  This position collaborates with all Regional Product Compliance Teams, the Global Compliance Team, and the entire Americas Business Integrity Team (Product Compliance, Trade Compliance, Public Relations, Government Relations) and the Business Teams.  This position is responsible for proficiently supporting pre-market and post-market product safety and product compliance activities. 

Job Responsibilities

Support enablement of market access through successful execution of the Pre-Market Research Standard Operating Procedure and Work Instructions.

  • Support research as requested.
  • Support the request for proposal process, set up new third party service providers, and verify and process invoices.
  • Flag news content regarding regulatory activity (e.g. rules, bans, regulations, standards, guidance documents, enforcement actions and public notices), including those across geographic markets.
  • Accurately track and document all research. Query databases, analyze data, identify patterns and trends, and prepare accurate, informative, impactful reports and presentations for leadership.
  • Support Product Compliance Team educational efforts.

Support product investigations through successful execution of the Post-Market Surveillance Standard Operating Procedure and Work Instructions.

  • Create internal and external communications following templates and annexes.
  • Conduct artificial intelligence image searches and key word searches on internal and external sites. Exercise good judgement when reviewing, categorizing, and tagging products and content.  Escalate product and content issues to leadership as appropriate. 
  • Ensure non-compliant and unsafe products are quickly delisted and sufficiently gated.
  • Accurately maintain tracker and case files (e.g. Trigger, Investigation, Risk Analysis, Corrective Action, Root Cause Analysis, and Preventive Action).
  • Query databases, analyze data, identify patterns and trends, and prepare accurate, informative, impactful reports.

Professional performance and business impact.

  • Manage the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of systematic data tracking.
  • Manage the development, implementation, and continuous improvement of Standard Operating Procedures and Work Instructions.
  • Efficiently manage incoming communication from the Americas Product Compliance shared email mailbox.
  • Efficiently archive documents in the Global Product Compliance Sharepoint.
  • Complete quarterly continuing education on topics agreed upon by leadership.
  • Perform other duties as assigned.

Job Requirements 

  • A bachelor’s degree in a relevant area (information and library science, legal research, law, or engineering). 
  • 3+ years of relevant combined experience in consumer product compliance (product safety; regulations research; standards interpretation, guidance, and enforcement actions; technical writing; competitive intelligence services; and/or product recalls). 
  • Subject matter expertise in particular products, countries, and / or policy areas with competence transferring those skills to new products, countries, and / or policy areas.
  • Experience utilizing a wide variety of research databases and online resources.
  • Competent interpreting regulations and standards and to quickly assimilate and assess new information and develop plans to capitalize or react to these requirements.
  • Demonstrated ability to understand “the question behind the question.”
  • Exceptional program and project management, and problem-solving skills.
  • Strong organizational skills with efficiency, attention to detail, and ability to deliver accuracy quickly.
  • Self-starter, entrepreneurial, “roll up your sleeves” attitude.
  • Ability to influence people and drive projects to completion.
  • Ability to be agile in a fast-paced start-up environment with shifting demands and tight deadlines.
  • Flexibility to accommodate video conference calls between countries around the world.
  • Strong computer skills including the use of Microsoft Office.
  • Ability to travel when needed.

Nice to Have

  • Bilingual in Mandarin.
  • Experience with product recalls in multiple countries.

Benefits and Perks

  • Bonus eligible
  • Healthcare (medical, dental, vision, prescription drugs)
  • Health Savings Account with Employer Funding
  • Flexible Spending Accounts (Healthcare and Dependent care)
  • Company-Paid Basic Life/AD&D insurance
  • Company-Paid Short-Term and Long-Term Disability
  • Voluntary Benefit Offerings (Voluntary Life/AD&D, Hospital Indemnity, Critical Illness, and Accident)
  • Employee Assistance Program
  • Business Travel Accident Insurance
  • 401(k) savings plan with discretionary company match and access to a financial advisor to meet retirement planning goals.
  • Vacation-Paid time off
  • 9 Paid Holidays/6 Sick Days
  • Employee Discounts
  • Perks (HQ Location)
  • Free weekly catered lunch at HQ
  • Dog-Friendly office
  • Free Gym Access at HQ
  • Free Swag Giveaways

#LI-ED1

jobs.title: Photography Studio Assistant
jobs.description:
About SHEIN EMEA
SHEIN is a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, providing an extensive range of affordable, SHEIN-branded apparel and products sourced from a global network of vendors. Since our founding in 2012, we have expanded to serve customers in over 150 countries worldwide. Our EMEA headquarters are in Dublin, and we now operate over 15 offices across the EMEA region.
 
At SHEIN, our mission is to make the beauty of fashion accessible to all. Through our industry-leading, on-demand production model, we support a smarter, more future-ready fashion industry that adapts to the changing needs of our customers.
 
Learn more about SHEIN by following us at https://careers.shein.com/ and https://www.sheingroup.com. 
 
Position Summary
We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Photography Studio Assistant to support our photographers and studio manager in the planning, setup, and execution of studio and location based photoshoots, sample control and studio organisation. The ideal candidate will play a key role in ensuring smooth and efficient studio transitions, managing equipment, and maintaining consistency across visual assets for multiple shoots. Working alongside creative lead and production to facilitate set setup fast and efficient

Job Responsibilities

  • Prepare sets and equipment for photoshoots, ensuring everything is in place before shooting begins.
  • Test new setups, lighting, and other technical aspects to ensure smooth transitions during studio setup.
  • Efficiently break down sets from previous shoot, ensuring all equipment is put back onto its original place and any damage is reported.
  • Proactively ensure the workspace adheres to company health and safety guidelines, promoting a safe environment for all involved.
  • Manage the studio photography equipment inventory, track equipment check-in and check-out, and organize regular maintenance under the supervision of the Photography Manager and Studio Manager.
  • Responsible for maintaining the studio and office space and surroundings organised, safe and meet the high standard set by the Studio Manager.
  • Assist photographers with shooting casting, production, and location photoshoots as required.
  • Provide logistical and practical support for photoshoots to ensure seamless execution.
  • Assist creatives with pre-production tasks such as set building, painting, and prop management to ensure the required elements are in place for the shoot.
  • Upload shoot images independently, ensuring all deadlines and delivery targets are consistently met.
  • Manage and resolve any image-related issues to ensure smooth and timely delivery.
  • Maintain a records of all uploaded jobs along with any issues encountered.
  • Maintain and manage content on the internal website.
  • Ensure the internal site is regularly updated with shoot previews and relevant content.
  • Provide general assistance to photographers, Studo Manager and, the creative team as needed, ensuring smooth operations during and after photoshoots.
  • Support checking-in samples across multiple documents and inspecting physical samples conditions.
  • Support with monthly charity donations.
  • Create and distribute a monthly internal newsletter, ensuring key updates and highlights are effectively communicated.
  • Create content for showroom screen displays.
     

Job Requirements

  • Ability to prioritize and multitask effectively in a fast-paced, reactive environment.
  • A problem solver with an impeccable eye for detail, capable of focusing and following through in a dynamic environment.
  • A "can-do" attitude under consistent workload with the ability to stay motivated and perform effectively.
  • Able to work effectively as part of a team and communicate clearly with colleagues and external teams.
  • Strong interest in fashion, studio, and production processes, with the ability to bring creativity into the setup and execution.
  • Strong time management skills and punctuality, with an organized approach to tasks.
  • Good communication skills for relaying instructions, ideas, and feedback clearly.
  • 2 years+ experience as a photographer assistant or in a related production role.
  • In-depth knowledge of modern photography techniques, including studio and location shoots.
  • Naturally creative with a strong eye for color, style, and detail.
  • Familiarity with Canon, Sony, Profoto, Aperture, Capture One, Photoshop
  • Physically able to move heavy equipment, props, and other materials around the studio and location shoots.

SHEIN DISTRIBUTION UK LIMITED is an equal opportunity employer committed to a diverse workplace environment.

jobs.title: Senior Buyer I
jobs.description:
Job Responsibilities

Identify and select merchandise that aligns with our brand's aesthetic and customer base.
Offline visit markets to evaluate and select suppliers to choose the best products
Maintain an up-to-date knowledge of fashion trends, consumer behavior, and industry shifts.
Monitor fashion trends and consumer preferences through various sources (fashion shows, social media, market research).
Conduct analysis to forecast upcoming seasons’ collections, ensuring product selections align with market demand.
Establish and maintain strong relationships with store owners, manufacturers, and designers.
Provide input on the visual merchandising of stores and online platforms.
Prepare and present regular reports on purchasing activity and sales performance.
Provide insights and recommendations for improving buying strategies and product assortment.
Assist vendors in completing SHEIN account registration, product photography, product listing, and sales, resolving any issues encountered during the process.
Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree completed
Strong knowledge of fashion trends, consumer behavior, and market analysis.
Excellent negotiation and communication skills.
Ability to manage budgets, forecast trends, and work under tight deadlines.
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
Willing to go to commercial areas of CDMX (Tepito) and Estado de Mexico.
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word)
Passion for fashion and an eye for identifying products that will appeal to the target market.
Ability to work in a fast-paced, ever-evolving environment.
Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
Creative and innovative mindset with attention to detail.
Excellent English (required)

Establish and maintain strong relationships with store owners, manufacturers, and designers.
Provide input on the visual merchandising of stores and online platforms.
Prepare and present regular reports on purchasing activity and sales performance.
Provide insights and recommendations for improving buying strategies and product assortment.
Assist vendors in completing SHEIN account registration, product photography, product listing, and sales, resolving any issues encountered during the process.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Fashion Designer
Strong knowledge of fashion trends, consumer behavior, and market analysis.
Excellent negotiation and communication skills.
Ability to manage budgets, forecast trends, and work under tight deadlines.
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
Willing to go to commercial areas of CDMX (Tepito) and Estado de Mexico.
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word)
Passion for fashion and an eye for identifying products that will appeal to the target market.
Ability to work in a fast-paced, ever-evolving environment.
Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
Creative and innovative mindset with attention to detail.
Excellent English (required)

jobs.title: 高级商品企划（额度规划）

岗位职责：

2、执行制定好的评价商品销售好坏的各个衡量数据分析指标进行考核，达到目标标准才算完成计划，并进行跟踪复盘调整计划;

3、负责各个开发部门的每个月的商品开发开始和上架完成的时间进度节点，以便进行有效的时间控制;

4、负责管控各个开发部门的每个月的商品品类开发数量，对其开发能力的产能及资源合理配置和有效管控;

5、负责对开发部门的数量企划的发布和核对、录入系统工作，负责每月目标SKU上新确认统计，每月目标完成进度的复盘跟踪，发现数据指标异常及时汇报。

职位要求：

1. 本科及以上学历，统计、数学、计算机、财会等相关专业 ；

2. 2年及以上数据分析工作经验，有商品品类管理、品牌分析、电商工作经验优先 ；

3. 有较好的跨部门沟通能力，能承受一定的工作压力，能适应快速变化的业务环境；有团队协作能力，为人耐心细致，责任心强；

jobs.title: 资深/高级精益工程师（服装供应链方向）
jobs.description:
岗位职责：

1. 生产痛点挖掘与解决方案研究

o 根据业务发展对供应商的能力画像需求，以及服装供应商的需求反馈，系统性收集、分析生产流程中的效率瓶颈、浪费及痛点难题。

o 主导跨部门协作团队，制定针对性精益改善方案并推动落地。

2. 标准化培训体系搭建

o 根据供应商需求及行业痛点，设计并开发服装精益生产课程（如5S、IE手法、TPM、标准化作业等）。

o 制作标准化课件、案例库及操作手册，确保内容可落地、易传播。

3. 供应商赋能与效果追踪

o 联合业务方主导供应商培训赋能工作，推动精益课程、工具在供应商端的实践应用。

o 建立培训效果评估机制，通过数据（如生产效率、成本节约、质量合格率等）量化改善成果。

4. 持续优化与知识沉淀

o 定期复盘改善项目，提炼方法论并迭代优化培训体系。

o 协同业务部门推动供应链精益文化渗透，形成长期赋能机制。


任职要求

1. 教育背景

o 本科及以上学历，工业工程、服装工程、纺织工程、管理科学与工程等相关专业优先。

2. 工作经验

o 3年以上服装/纺织行业精益生产相关经验，熟悉裁剪、缝制、后整等环节的工艺流程及痛点。

o 具备从0到1主导精益改善项目并输出标准化成果的经验。

3. 核心能力

o 精益技能：精通IE手法、价值流分析（VSM）、SMED等工具，能独立设计改善方案。

o 数据分析：熟练使用Excel/PPT，具备通过数据拆解问题、验证效果的能力。

o 培训能力：逻辑清晰，擅长课程开发与现场授课，能深入浅出传递专业知识。

o 沟通协作：具备跨部门及外部供应商的协同推动力，抗压性强。

4. 加分项

o 持有精益六西格玛绿带/黑带、培训师资格认证（如TTT）。

o 熟悉服装行业供应商管理或智能制造转型趋势。
